projectDescription: A sample distributed application demonstrating multi-container Docker deployments with Python, Node.js, and .NET services, deployable via Docker Compose, Docker Swarm, or Kubernetes.
keyFeatures: Deployable via Docker Compose for local development
Docker Swarm support with multiple replicas
Redis message queue for vote buffering
PostgreSQL persistent storage for vote tallying
Multi-stage Docker builds for dev and production
Health checks for all dependent services
publicApiSurface: vote service — HTTP POST / (submit vote), HTTP GET / (view ballot) on port 8080
result service — HTTP GET / (view results), WebSocket scores event on port 8081
OPTION_A env var — customizes first voting option (default: Cats)
OPTION_B env var — customizes second voting option (default: Dogs)
docker compose up — start all services locally
docker stack deploy --compose-file docker-stack.yml vote — deploy to Swarm
kubectl create -f k8s-specifications/ — deploy to Kubernetes
docker compose --profile seed up -d — seed database with sample votes
